visible_rules.label: removable residue allowlist
visible_rules.description: Only these known cache and stale runtime artifacts are eligible for automatic cleanup.

visible_rules.label: platform release root
visible_rules.description: Platform-scoped release staging root tracked by the installer.

visible_rules.label: runtime roots
visible_rules.description: Standard repo-local roots that every platform install must expose.

visible_rules.label: embedded runtime manifest
visible_rules.description: Installer-managed Elixir/OTP and Node payloads are visible in the staged release manifest before launch.

visible_rules.label: protected paths
visible_rules.description: Repair must not remove user environment, runtime data, release snapshots, or desktop shells.

visible_rules.label: required shipping version
visible_rules.description: Desktop shells, workspace packages, and local release descriptors are expected to align to this working version.

visible_rules.label: repair action
visible_rules.value: prepare standard layout, then remove allowlisted residue
visible_rules.description: Repair is deterministic and intentionally narrow so it never becomes a hidden cleanup burden.
